summary: Well-structured test suite with comprehensive coverage of core functionality. Unit tests (test_license_checker.py) exercise all major functions with good separation of concerns and clear naming. Integration tests (test_workflow.py) validate workflow structure, actionlint compliance, and end-to-end behavior via act. Fixtures are properly mocked and tests are independent. Gaps: parse_requirements lacks edge case coverage (version specifiers beyond ==, inline comments, package extras like flask[async], case sensitivity); LicenseLookup.from_json_file() has no direct unit test; deny-list precedence documented but not explicitly tested with same license in both lists. Would reliably catch regressions in core classification logic, report generation, and workflow structure, but might miss parsing robustness issues.
